info.title: CAS genesisWorld REST Webservice - v7.0
info.description:
The REST API for CAS genesisWorld.
Please note that not all schemas are documented with OpenAPI yet. We're working on extending this documentation. In the meantime, you can find the schemas in the partner portal documentation.

post.description: This is a guess based on the provided fields.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The add-in which should be loaded

200.description: A file stream with the add-in

post.summary: Upload file to temporary file storage
post.description:
The location of this file can be referenced during a document data object create/update operation.
If this is done the temp file will be persisted permanently in the document archive.

delete.summary: Delete file from temporary file storage
delete.description: If this is not called, the file will be removed after some time because the storage is temporary.

get.summary: Gets the archive zip file for the given fileId

parameters.name: fileId
parameters.description: The ID of the zip file that should be loaded

200.description: A file stream with the ZIP file

get.description: Get all versions to a document.

post.description: Archives the current document file state as a new version with the comment in genesisWorld.

requestBody.description: The version comment for the new version.

post.description: Restore the working state of the document with the file state of a specific version.
The formatting is based on the given country code

parameters.description: Guid of the template to be used. If no template can be found, the default template will be used.

requestBody.description: The email to archive, in .eml format.

get.description: Lists all active databases. Disconnected or out-of-date databases will be missing.
Returns full meta information about a single link.

parameters.name: dataObjectType
parameters.description: ObjectType1 of the link

parameters.name: dataObjectGGUID
parameters.description: GGUID1 of the link

parameters.name: objecttype2
parameters.description: ObjectType2 of the link

parameters.name: guid2
parameters.description: GGUID2 of the link

parameters.name: attribute
parameters.description: This parameter is optional. If it is missing we assume an unattributed link.

delete.description:
This will remove the specified link. If there are multiple links between the two objects, the other links will not
be effected and therefore a relationship between the two data objects will still appear in the link list and in the
dossier.

parameters.name: dataObjectType
parameters.description: ObjectType1 of the link

parameters.name: dataObjectGGUID
parameters.description: GGUID1 of the link

parameters.name: objecttype2
parameters.description: ObjectType2 of the link

parameters.name: guid2
parameters.description: GGUID2 of the link

parameters.name: attribute
parameters.description: Attribute of the links. Unattributed links can also be removed without the default attribute.

post.description:
In the post body the GGUID1-ObjectType1 pair or the
GGUID2-ObjectType2 pair is required.
If the first pair is specified, the link is flipped by the server.

parameters.name: dataObjectType
parameters.description:
If ObjectType1 is defined in link, this is ObjectType2. Otherwise it
is ObjectType1.

parameters.name: dataObjectGGUID
parameters.description: If GGUID1 is defined in link, this is GGUID2. Otherwise it is GGUID1.

Location.name: Location
Location.description: The URI of the created link.

get.description:
This returns the full list of links the data object has. This includes links to data objects which can not be
loaded due to missing permissions and multiple links to the same data object due to different attributes.

parameters.name: object-type
parameters.description: Filters the links by object type. If missing the list is unfiltered.

parameters.name: gguid
parameters.description: Filters the links by data object guid. If missing the list is unfiltered.

parameters.name: attribute
parameters.description: Filters the links by link attribute. If missing the list is unfiltered.

parameters.name: link-direction
parameters.description: Filters the links by link direction. If missing the list is unfiltered.

get.summary: Returns the formatted html content of a notes field.

post.summary:
Prepend or append an affix to the existing content of the specified formatted field. The affix may be provided as
plain text, html, or a multipart MIME message. The format needs to be specified in the content type.

parameters.name: content-type
parameters.description: Supported content types: text/plain, text/html, multipart/alternative, multipart/related.

parameters.name: prepend
parameters.description: If true, prepend the affix to the existing notes, otherwise append the affix.

parameters.name: with-timestamp
parameters.description: Prepend a timestamp and user to the affix before affixing to the notes.

requestBody.description: Formatted notes to prepend or append. May be plain, html or multipart.

get.summary: Get address salutations by country code

parameters.name: countryCode
parameters.description: e.g. DE

post.description: Creates a new event registration. This is intended to be used from portal solutions.

parameters.name: tag-as-recently-used
parameters.description: If set to true, this operation counts towards the recently used tracking of data objects.

requestBody.description:
An instance of RegistrationParameters containing the parameters for the registration.
At least ParticipantGUID and EventGUID are required. If you leave out RegistrationDate, the current date will be
used.

201.description: The registration has been created successfully.

409.description: A conflicting registration (same event, same participant) already exists.

get.description:
Retrieves information about the tree of accounting positions that is linked to the event.
If you do not provide the "accounting-positions" query parameter, the server will try to
determine one matching price position. If successful, all prices except the one that has been
automatically selected will have been pruned from the result (unless you have set prune to false).
Otherwise, all prices are returned. Accounting positions of other types than prices (e. g.
additional services) are always returned so the user can see them.

parameters.name: dataObjectGGUID
parameters.description: GUID of the event for which the accounting prices should be calculated.

parameters.name: participant
parameters.description:
GUID of an address to be registered for an event. Useful if prices have filters for the
address.

parameters.name: registration-date
parameters.description: Date for a new event registration. Might be relevant if prices have date filters.

parameters.name: prune
parameters.description: True if accounting positions that have not been selected should be removed (which is the default).

parameters.name: accounting-positions
parameters.description:
Comma-separated list of accounting position GUIDs. Exactly these positions will be included in the returned
accounting tree.

200.description: The tree of the event's accounting positions and the automatic price calculation success.

post.summary: Update the state of an event registration

get.description: This returns the description and schema for multiple object types in a single call.

get.summary: Get country names by iso code

get.description:
Gets the currently active genders. If the ChristianName
query parameter is provided, then only the gender matching the given christian name will be
returned.

put.description:
Replaces the entire collection of dependent data objects of a superior data
object with another collection. DataObjects that reside in both collections are updated.
Data objects which missing from the update are removed.

post.description: Creates a new dependent data object with the fields contained in the post request.

get.description: This returns the types which depend on the given object type e.g. GWOPPORTUNITYPOS for GWOPPORTUNITY.

parameters.name: dataObjectType
parameters.description: Type of the data object

post.description:
Creates a new data object, which is a duplicate of another data object.
This data object is not visible till it is committed.

parameters.name: include-permissions
parameters.description: Indicates if the permissions should be serialized.

parameters.name: include-syncrecord-permissions
parameters.description: Indicates if the sync record permissions should be serialized. Only valid if sync is enabled for the data record type. It implies include-permissions=true.

post.description:
Updates a duplicated data object to commit it finally on the server.
Afterwards it will be a regular data object.

requestBody.description:
This data object is optional. It may contain the values which should be changed compared to
the duplicate.

put.description:
The update types "ALL" and "SINGLE" are possible.
If UpdateType "ALL" is set, then the changes supplied to the ReferenceEvent will be applied
to the occurrences of the series.
If UpdateType "SINGLE" is selected, then only the fields of the ReferenceEvent itself gets updated.
Always include the GGUID field in the referencePeriodicEvent to identify the referenced object.

parameters.name: dataObjectType
parameters.description: The type of the recurrent data object to update

delete.description:
If some of the occurring objects cannot be deleted (for example due to insufficient permissions), that does not
cause this operation to fail.

parameters.name: dataObjectType
parameters.description: Type of the data object

parameters.name: periodGuid
parameters.description: The common PERIODGUID value of all occurring data objects in the series that should be deleted

get.description:
Gets the meta data for the given data object type e.g. permissions, translations, link attributes
excluding the field descriptions.

Validates whether API credentials are valid by re-initializing the user's internal session.
Note that any endpoint requiring authentication can be used for validating credentials.

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Specifies which data object fields should be returned.

parameters.name: include-permissions
parameters.description: Indicates if the permissions should be serialized.

parameters.name: include-syncrecord-permissions
parameters.description: Indicates if the sync record permissions should be serialized. Only valid if sync is enabled for the data record type. It implies include-permissions=true.

parameters.name: tag-as-recently-used
parameters.description: If set to true, the load of this data object will be tracked as a usage for recently used.

put.description:
This updates an existing data object.
Properties missing from the request body will stay unchanged.

parameters.name: tag-as-recently-used
parameters.description: If set to true, the load of this data object will be tracked as a usage for recently used.

delete.description: If the data object type has a recycle bin, the object will be moved to there instead.

parameters.description: If set to true, the load of this data object will be tracked as a usage for recently used.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Filters the list for data objects matching the search term. This uses the users search fields defined in the Desktop Client.

parameters.name: updated-after
parameters.description: Filters by UPDATETIMESTAMP. Needs a datetime in ISO-Format.

parameters.name: inserted-after
parameters.description: Filters by INSERTTIMESTAMP. Needs a datetime in ISO-Format.

parameters.name: interval-start
parameters.description: Used together with interval-end. Filters data object with START_DT and END_DT for an interval. Needs a datetime in ISO-Format.

parameters.name: interval-end
parameters.description: Used together with interval-start. Filters data object with START_DT and END_DT for an interval. Needs a datetime in ISO-Format.

parameters.name: linked-to-type
parameters.description: Filters the list for data objects which are linked to the type.

parameters.name: linked-to
parameters.description: Requires linked-to-type. A comma separated string of GGUIDs.

parameters.name: linked-to-attributes
parameters.description: Requires linked-to, linked-to-type. Filters the links additionally for the attributes.

parameters.name: is-user

parameters.name: has-birthday-on
parameters.description: Only for ADDRESS. Filters the list for addresses which have birthday. Needs a datetime in ISO-Format.

parameters.name: include-deactivated
parameters.description: If true, deactivated addresses will be returned for ADDRESS views. Does not change anything for non-ADDRESS views.

Returns the icons as configured in the management console, or as saved in Server/DotNetData/TypeDefinitions/

get.summary: Check user's license for the service

BinaryResourceInfo.description: A binary payload. Where a filetype is necessary, it can be read/written via the CAS-FILE-EXTENSION header. When uploading binary payloads without this header, the file extension will be guessed based on the Content-Type.

tagDetails.description: The details to identify the tag which was assigned/unassigned.

GGUID.description:
Computed GUID to identify the link.
This is not a GUID in the regular format. It is a concatenation of all fields which mark this link as unique.
It has the form:
ObjectType1@GGUID1@ObjectType2@GGUID2@Attribute

LinkDirection.description: Represents the directions links can be

payRecipientGUID.description: GUID for the payment recipient address

appointmentGUIDs.description: Comma-separated list of appointment GUIDs. Will create additional registration objects for all given appointments.

accountingPosGUIDs.description:
Comma-separated list of accounting position GUIDs. Will create an opportunity object based on the passed accounting
positions.

registrationState.description: State of the registration. Defaults to "open"/"offen".

EventAccountingCalculation.title: EventAccountingCalculation
EventAccountingCalculation.description: Information about an event's accounting positions and automatic price calculation result.

autoSelectedSuccess.description: True if the caller has passed no accounting-positions and the automatic price selection has been successful.

accounting.description: The tree of accounting positions linked to the event.

AccountingPosition.description: An accounting position or a tree of accounting positions linked to the event.

children.description: List of child accounting positions, recursively forming a tree.

price.description: Absolute price of this accounting position, for example the EUR value of a price

percent.description: Relative price of this accounting position, for example the percentage of a rebate

notes.description: Optional notes further describing this position

templateGuid.description: The GUID of the template accounting position from which this position was initially created

isGroup.description: If true, this is a group node which combines children that can only be selected together optionally

vat.description: Percentage of tax that will be added to the price

quantity.description: Number of times this position applies (usually 1 except for appointment prices)

appointmentGuid.description: GUID of the appointment if this position is an appointment price, otherwise empty GUID.

productGuid.description: GUID of the product that is associated with this position, or empty if no product associated

filterApplied.description: If true, this position has matched all its filters when trying the automatic price selection.

selected.description: If true, this position has matched all its filters and remains chosen after a successful automatic price selection.

sortOrder.description: A sort index which can be used to arrange the accounting positions in a sensible order

additionalProperties.title: Field
additionalProperties.description: Meta information about a database field

name.description: The name of the field in the database.

type.description: The type of the field value.

displayname.description: The long translated name for this field. If possible it will be returned in requested language.

displaynameShort.description: The short translated name for this field. If possible it will be returned in requested language.

mandatory.description: If it is set to true, this field should be set for data objects.

allOf.title: Description
allOf.description: Metadata of the data object type

PasswordComplexityRule.description: Represents an application server rule the complexity of new passwords.

id.description: Contains the GGUID of the data object. This GUID is also in fields.GGUID.

fields.description: The requested fields for this object type. Please check the schema for the list of fields which exist for an object type.

permissions.description: Only included in `GET data object` if it was requested with `include-permissions` or `include-syncrecord-permissions`

GGUID.description: Contains the GGUID of the data object. This GUID is also in fields.GGUID.

allOf.description: Contains the GGUID of the data object. This GUID is also in fields.GGUID.

writable.description: True if the user is allowed to modify this data object

ChangePasswordResult.description: Simple structure that represents the result of a password change request.

referencePeriodicEvent.description:
DataObject used for updating. PERIODGUID is required to update the recurrence.
Where possible, the changes performed on this dataObject will be applied to all dataObjects selected via UpdateType.

tagsToAssign.description: List of tags which should be assigned (already assigned tags are ignored).

tagsToUnassign.description: List of tags which should be unassigned (tags need not be assigned prior to request).

linksToAssign.description:
Only one half may be filled in. Together with the recurrent event it represents a full link.
If GGUID1 and ObjectType1 are filled, then the recurrent event represents the right part of a link.
If GGUID2 and ObjectType2 are filled, then the recurrent event represents the left part of the link.

linksToUnassign.description:
Only one half may be filled in. Together with the recurrent event it represents a full link.
If GGUID1 and ObjectType1 are filled, then the recurrent event represents the right part of a link.
If GGUID2 and ObjectType2 are filled, then the recurrent event represents the left part of the link.

periodicEventUpdateType.description:
Only update type "SINGLE" and "ALL" are supported.
If you select "SINGLE", then only the ReferenceEvent will be updated.
If you select "ALL", then all occurrences with the PERIODGUID of the ReferenceEvent will be updated.

GGUID.description:
Computed GUID to identify the link.
This is not a GUID in the regular format. It is a concatenation of all fields which mark this link as unique.
It has the form:
ObjectType1@GGUID1@ObjectType2@GGUID2@Attribute

LinkDirection.description: Represents the directions links can be

addressGuid.description: Contains the GGUID of the data object. This GUID is also in fields.GGUID.

opportunityCurrency.description: Sets the base currency of the opportunity. Positions which have a different currency then this will be considered differently for calculation.

PRODUCTGUID.description: Contains the GGUID of the data object. This GUID is also in fields.GGUID.

DataObjectMetaDataWrapper.title: Description
DataObjectMetaDataWrapper.description: Metadata of the data object type

DataObjectDescription.description: Contains a description of the data object type's fields

additionalProperties.title: Field
additionalProperties.description: Meta information about a database field

name.description: The name of the field in the database.

type.description: The type of the field value.

displayname.description: The long translated name for this field. If possible it will be returned in requested language.

displaynameShort.description: The short translated name for this field. If possible it will be returned in requested language.

mandatory.description: If it is set to true, this field should be set for data objects.

OAuth.description: OAuth for the genesisWorld server. You can find out more on enabling it at the [partner portal](https://partnerportal.cas.de/partnerportal/teamworks.dll/Internal/document/0x177AFFB0336F42DAB604DA1D9B91EFF9/EN_CAS%20Authentication%20Server.PDF?64118&OQS=13-16721&parenttagid=e0x9C22CBD4FF27324894F99D74275DE609&ShowSysMessages=true&urlencUTF8=true)

Basic Auth.description:
Basic auth for the CAS genesisWorld server. The username is in the format `<database>/<username>`.
If no database is named, the default database is used.

tags.name: Data Object
tags.description: This calls work for all data object types. If no special calls exist this API should be used to interact with the data object.
